impact: Advances the PP&D plan by adding fixture-only validation that agents fail closed before trade-permit plan-review submission, fee payment, and official correction upload actions without required user facts, files, or exact confirmation.
summary: Add deterministic trade-permit-with-plan-review guardrail fixture tests for missing facts, required documents, payment stop points, and correction-upload confirmation gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-38: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for trade-permit-with-plan-review missing facts, required documents, payment stop points, and correction-upload confirmation gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
